Local viewer font payload.

Fonts vendored here:

- Space Grotesk
- IBM Plex Mono

Source:

- https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Space+Grotesk
- https://fonts.google.com/specimen/IBM+Plex+Mono

These files were copied into the repo so live desktop, packaged desktop, and offline `file://`
viewer runs do not depend on `fonts.googleapis.com` or `fonts.gstatic.com` for first paint.

License:

- SIL Open Font License 1.1
